subject: Daylight_v0.6
open_predicate: Open(omega) != bottom iff all public_precheck_predicates and all private_open_predicates hold
private_operation_barrier: any failed public_precheck_predicate blocks private KEM, AEAD.Dec, and plaintext materialization

security_claims.confidentiality: If all confidentiality assumptions hold, Open materializes plaintext only when public and private predicates all hold; otherwise Open = bottom.
security_claims.authorization: Open cannot succeed without V_Auth, GateOK, PolicyOK, ClaimOK, and ContentReviewPreOK.
security_claims.downgrade_resistance: Open cannot succeed when NoDowngradeFinal, ModeOK, PolicyOK, or ClaimOK is false.
security_claims.fail_closed_release: Every single failed public or private predicate forces Open = bottom; every failed public predicate also blocks private operations.

forbidden_claims: reviewed_content publicly proves absence of hidden content
witness evidence proves no private material exists
audit log is a confidentiality primitive
non_claims: this symbolic model is not a mechanized theorem-prover proof
this symbolic model is not external review
this symbolic model is not production authority
this symbolic model does not claim runtime containment
this symbolic model does not claim whole-system post-quantum safety
this symbolic model does not replace constant-time and failure-path review
remaining_proof_obligations: mechanized proof or independent formal-methods review
at least two independent external reviews
